text.title: Founder Deal Kill Rule Procedure
text.summary: 5-step weekly procedure to produce a kill batch.

step.name: pull-pipeline
step.action: Pull every active deal with last_reply, last_meeting, milestone status, budget_confirmed, champion fields.

step.name: apply-rules
step.action: For each deal compute trips array. Mark candidates (trips length ≥ 2) for action.

step.name: batch-decide
step.action: Apply two-trip-auto-kill: ≥2 trips → action=killed (with reversal_window_days=30). Single-trip deals → kept. Edge cases (champion left but other signals positive) → escalated.

step.name: notify-and-update
step.action: Update CRM stage = "dead" for killed; tag escalated for owner 5-min review. Send light "we'll archive unless you ping us" email to prospects for killed (where appropriate).

step.name: log-and-schedule-retro
step.action: Append to kill log. Schedule quarterly retro to refine thresholds.
